KSP `2.1.0-1.0.29` 在阿里云镜像上找不到。换一个更常见的版本 `2.1.0-1.0.28`。

content.content:
1→package com.multilanglearner.ui.home
     2→
     3→import android.app.Application
     4→import android.net.Uri
     5→import androidx.lifecycle.AndroidViewModel
     6→import androidx.lifecycle.viewModelScope
     7→import com.multilanglearner.data.db.entity.VideoEntity
     8→import com.multilanglearner.data.repository.VideoRepository
     9→import com.multilanglearner.data.store.ThemeStore
    10→import com.yausername.youtubedl_android.YoutubeDL
    11→import com.yausername.youtubedl_android.YoutubeDLRequest
    12→import dagger.hilt.android.lifecycle.HiltViewModel
    13→import kotlinx.coroutines.Dispatchers
    14→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.*
    15→import kotlinx.coroutines.launch
    16→import java.io.File
    17→import javax.inject.Inject
    18→
    19→data class HomeUiState(
    20→    val url: String = "",
    21→    val selectedLang: String = "en",
    22→    val isDownloading: Boolean = false,
    23→    val downloadProgress: Float = 0f,
    24→    val statusText: String = "",
    25→    val videos: List<VideoEntity> = emptyList()
    26→)
    27→
    28→@HiltViewModel
    29→class HomeViewModel @Inject constructor(
    30→    application: Application,
    31→    private val videoRepository: VideoRepository,
    32→    private val themeStore: ThemeStore
    33→) : AndroidViewModel(application) {
    34→    private val _uiState = MutableStateFlow(HomeUiState())
    35→    val uiState: StateFlow<HomeUiState> = _uiState.asStateFlow()
    36→
    37→    private val downloadsDir: File = File(application.filesDir, "downloads").also { it.mkdirs() }
    38→
    39→    init {
    40→        viewModelScope.launch {
    41→            videoRepository.getAll().collect { videos ->
    42→                _uiState.update { it.copy(videos = videos) }
    43→            }
    44→        }
    45→    }
    46→
    47→    fun setUrl(url: String) { _uiState.update { it.copy(url = url) } }
    48→    fun setLang(lang: String) { _uiState.update { it.copy(selectedLang = lang) } }
    49→
    50→    fun setTheme(theme: String) { viewModelScope.launch { themeStore.setTheme(theme) } }
    51→    fun setFontSize(size: String) { viewModelScope.launch { themeStore.setFontSize(size) } }
    52→
    53→    fun downloadVideo(onComplete: (String, String?) -> Unit) {
    54→        val url = _uiState.value.url.trim()
    55→        if (url.isBlank()) return
    56→
    57→        _uiState.update { it.copy(isDownloading = true, downloadProgress = 0f, statusText = "正在下载...") }
    58→
    59→        viewModelScope.launch(Dispatchers.IO) {
    60→            try {
    61→                val request = YoutubeDLRequest(url).apply {
    62→                    addOption("-o", "${downloadsDir.absolutePath}/%(title)s.%(ext)s")
    63→                    addOption("--write-sub")
    64→                    addOption("--write-auto-sub")
    65→                    addOption("--sub-lang", _uiState.value.selectedLang)
    66→                    addOption("--sub-format", "vtt")
    67→                    addOption("--convert-subs", "vtt")
    68→                    addOption("-f", "bestvideo[height<=720]+bestaudio/best[height<=720]/best")
    69→                    addOption("--merge-output-format", "mp4")
    70→                    addOption("--no-playlist")
    71→                }
    72→
    73→                YoutubeDL.getInstance().execute(request) { progress, _, line ->
    74→                    _uiState.update { it.copy(downloadProgress = progress / 100f, statusText = "下载中 ${progress.toInt()}%") }
    75→                }
    76→
    77→                // Find downloaded files
    78→                val mp4Files = downloadsDir.listFiles { f -> f.extension == "mp4" }?.sortedByDescending { it.lastModified() }
    79→                val videoFile = mp4Files?.firstOrNull()
    80→                if (videoFile != null) {
    81→                    val vttFile = downloadsDir.listFiles { f ->
    82→                        f.nameWithoutExtension.startsWith(videoFile.nameWithoutExtension) && f.extension == "vtt"
    83→                    }?.firstOrNull()
    84→
    85→                    val entity = VideoEntity(
    86→                        title = videoFile.nameWithoutExtension,
    87→                        filePath = videoFile.absolutePath,
    88→                        vttPath = vttFile?.absolutePath,
    89→                        language = _uiState.value.selectedLang,
    90→                        sourceUrl = url
    91→                    )
    92→                    videoRepository.insert(entity)
    93→
    94→                    _uiState.update { it.copy(isDownloading = false, statusText = "下载完成!") }
    95→                    launch(Dispatchers.Main) { onComplete(videoFile.absolutePath, vttFile?.absolutePath) }
    96→                } else {
    97→                    _uiState.update { it.copy(isDownloading = false, statusText = "下载失败") }
    98→                }
    99→            } catch (e: Exception) {
   100→                _uiState.update { it.copy(isDownloading = false, statusText = "失败: ${e.message}") }

100→
   101→        // Decorative circles
   102→        val circlePaint = Paint().apply { color = 0x1FFFFFFF; isAntiAlias = true }
   103→        for (i in 0 until 8) {
   104→            val cx = (Math.random() * W).toFloat()
   105→            val cy = (Math.random() * H * 0.7).toFloat()
   106→            val r = (40 + Math.random() * 100).toFloat()
   107→            canvas.drawCircle(cx, cy, r, circlePaint)
   108→        }
   109→
   110→        // Semi-transparent overlay
   111→        val overlayPaint = Paint().apply {
   112→            shader = LinearGradient(0f, 0f, 0f, H.toFloat(),
   113→                intArrayOf(0x26000000, 0x0D000000, 0x1A000000, 0x8C000000),
   114→                floatArrayOf(0f, 0.4f, 0.6f, 1f), Shader.TileMode.CLAMP)
   115→        }
   116→        canvas.drawRect(0f, 0f, W.toFloat(), H.toFloat(), overlayPaint)
   117→
   118→        // Title
   119→        val titlePaint = Paint().apply {
   120→            color = Color.WHITE; textSize = 24f; isAntiAlias = true; isFakeBoldText = true
   121→            typeface = Typeface.DEFAULT_BOLD
   122→        }
   123→        val titleBgPaint = Paint().apply { color = 0xE65b7a5e.toInt(); isAntiAlias = true }
   124→        val titleText = "📚 $title"
   125→        val tw = titlePaint.measureText(titleText) + 40
   126→        canvas.drawRoundRect(20f, 16f, 20f + tw, 64f, 24f, 24f, titleBgPaint)
   127→        canvas.drawText(titleText, 40f, 48f, titlePaint)
   128→
   129→        // Word cards
   130→        val n = wordDetails.size
   131→        val cols = minOf(3, n)
   132→        val rows = (n + cols - 1) / cols
   133→        val cardW = 300f; val cardH = 62f; val gapX = 16f; val gapY = 14f
   134→        val gridW = cols * (cardW + gapX) - gapX
   135→        val gridH = rows * (cardH + gapY) - gapY
   136→        val ox = (W - gridW) / 2
   137→        val oy = H - gridH - 40
   138→
   139→        val cardBgPaint = Paint().apply { color = 0xEBFFFFFF.toInt(); isAntiAlias = true }
   140→        val barPaint = Paint().apply { color = 0xFF5b7a5e.toInt(); isAntiAlias = true }
   141→        val numPaint = Paint().apply { color = Color.WHITE; textSize = 11f; isAntiAlias = true; textAlign = Paint.Align.CENTER; isFakeBoldText = true }
   142→        val wordPaint = Paint().apply { color = 0xFF1a1a1a.toInt(); textSize = 20f; isAntiAlias = true; isFakeBoldText = true }
   143→        val transPaint = Paint().apply { color = 0xFF5b7a5e.toInt(); textSize = 14f; isAntiAlias = true }
   144→
   145→        for (i in 0 until n) {
   146→            val col = i % cols; val row = i / cols
   147→            val x = ox + col * (cardW + gapX)
   148→            val y = oy + row * (cardH + gapY)
   149→
   150→            canvas.drawRoundRect(x, y, x + cardW, y + cardH, 12f, 12f, cardBgPaint)
   151→            canvas.drawRoundRect(x, y, x + 6, y + cardH, 3f, 3f, barPaint)
   152→
   153→            // Number circle
   154→            canvas.drawCircle(x + 22, y + 20, 10f, barPaint)
   155→            canvas.drawText((i + 1).toString(), x + 22, y + 24, numPaint)
   156→
   157→            // Word
   158→            canvas.drawText(wordDetails[i].first, x + 40, y + 26, wordPaint)
   159→            // Translation
   160→            val trans = wordDetails[i].second.take(24)
   161→            canvas.drawText(trans, x + 40, y + 50, transPaint)
   162→        }
   163→
   164→        // Watermark
   165→        val wmPaint = Paint().apply { color = 0x80FFFFFF.toInt(); textSize = 11f; isAntiAlias = true; textAlign = Paint.Align.CENTER }
   166→        canvas.drawText("多语言视频学习 · 词汇场景图", W / 2f, H - 10f, wmPaint)
   167→
   168→        return bitmap
   169→    }
   170→}
   171→

package com.multilanglearner.domain.model

import kotlinx.serialization.Serializable

// 14 supported languages (from main.js LANGUAGES)
data class Language(
    val code: String,
    val name: String,
    val subCode: String,
    val ttsLocale: String
)

val LANGUAGES = listOf(
    Language("en", "英语", "en", "en-US"),
    Language("ja", "日语", "ja", "ja-JP"),
    Language("ko", "韩语", "ko", "ko-KR"),
    Language("ru", "俄语", "ru", "ru-RU"),
    Language("th", "泰语", "th", "th-TH"),
    Language("vi", "越南语", "vi", "vi-VN"),
    Language("ms", "马来语", "ms", "ms-MY"),
    Language("id", "印尼语", "id", "id-ID"),
    Language("ar", "阿拉伯语", "ar", "ar-SA"),
    Language("pt", "葡萄牙语", "pt", "pt-BR"),
    Language("es", "西班牙语", "es", "es-ES"),
    Language("fr", "法语", "fr", "fr-FR"),
    Language("de", "德语", "de", "de-DE"),
    Language("hi", "印地语", "hi", "hi-IN")
)

// VTT subtitle cue
data class SubtitleCue(
    val index: Int,
    val startMs: Long,
    val endMs: Long,
    val text: String,
    val translation: String? = null
)

// Word-level timestamp (from .wordts.json)
@Serializable
data class WordTimestamp(
    val w: String,
    val s: Double,
    val e: Double
)

// AI provider preset (from main.js AI_PROVIDERS)
data class AIProvider(
    val id: String,
    val name: String,
    val defaultBaseUrl: String,
    val defaultModel: String
)

val AI_PROVIDERS = listOf(
    AIProvider("openai", "OpenAI", "https://api.openai.com/v1", "gpt-4o-mini"),
    AIProvider("claude", "Claude", "https://api.anthropic.com/v1", "claude-sonnet-4-20250514"),
    AIProvider("groq", "Groq", "https://api.groq.com/openai/v1", "llama-3.3-70b-versatile"),
    AIProvider("deepseek", "DeepSeek(深度求索)", "https://api.deepseek.com/v1", "deepseek-chat"),
    AIProvider("qwen", "Qwen(通义千问)", "https://dashscope.aliyuncs.com/compatible-mode/v1", "qwen-plus"),
    AIProvider("zhipu", "Zhipu(智谱清言)", "https://open.bigmodel.cn/api/paas/v4", "glm-4-flash"),
    AIProvider("custom", "自定义(OpenAI兼容)", "", "")
)

// AI config (from ai_config.json)
data class AIConfig(
    val provider: String = "deepseek",
    val apiKey: String = "",
    val baseUrl: String = "",
    val model: String = "",
    val maxTokens: Int? = null,
    val temperature: Double? = null,
    val groqWhisperEnabled: Boolean = true,
    val whisperModel: String = "whisper-large-v3",
    val subtitleTranslateMode: String = "none"
)

// Regulation country (from regulations.json)
@Serializable
data class RegulationCountry(
    val code: String,
    val name: String,
    val lang: String,
    val items: List<RegulationItem>
)

@Serializable
data class RegulationItem(
    val id: Long = 0,
    val title: String,
    val content: String,
    val isUser: Boolean = false
)

// Word card display data
data class WordCardData(
    val word: String,
    val phonetic: String = "",
    val translation: String = "",
    val definitions: List<Definition> = emptyList(),
    val examples: List<String> = emptyList()
)

data class Definition(
    val partOfSpeech: String,
    val definition: String
)

// Video info
data class VideoInfo(
    val name: String,
    val videoPath: String,
    val subtitlePath: String? = null
)

// Baidu translate language map (from main.js BAIDU_LANG_MAP)
val BAIDU_LANG_MAP = mapOf(
    "en" to "en", "ja" to "jp", "ko" to "kor", "fr" to "fra",
    "de" to "de", "ru" to "ru", "es" to "spa", "pt" to "pt",
    "it" to "it", "ar" to "ara", "th" to "th", "vi" to "vie",
    "id" to "id", "ms" to "may", "hi" to "hi"
)

// Whisper detected language name to code (from main.js LANG_NAME_TO_CODE)
val LANG_NAME_TO_CODE = mapOf(
    "english" to "en", "japanese" to "ja", "korean" to "ko",
    "russian" to "ru", "thai" to "th", "vietnamese" to "vi",
    "malay" to "ms", "indonesian" to "id", "arabic" to "ar",
    "portuguese" to "pt", "spanish" to "es", "french" to "fr",
    "german" to "de", "hindi" to "hi", "chinese" to "zh"
)

package com.multilanglearner.ui.vocabulary

import android.app.Application
import android.graphics.*
import android.os.Environment
import androidx.lifecycle.AndroidViewModel
import androidx.lifecycle.viewModelScope
import com.multilanglearner.data.db.entity.FavoriteWord
import com.multilanglearner.data.network.AIService
import com.multilanglearner.data.repository.FavoriteRepository
import com.multilanglearner.data.store.AIConfigStore
import dagger.hilt.android.lifecycle.HiltViewModel
import kotlinx.coroutines.Dispatchers
import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.*
import kotlinx.coroutines.launch
import java.io.File
import java.io.FileOutputStream
import javax.inject.Inject

data class VocabUiState(
    val words: List<FavoriteWord> = emptyList(),
    val generatedImageBitmap: Bitmap? = null,
    val statusText: String = ""
)

@HiltViewModel
class VocabularyViewModel @Inject constructor(
    application: Application,
    private val favoriteRepository: FavoriteRepository,
    private val aiService: AIService,
